# LifeLink Sync — LLM Context File
# Version: 1.0
# Last updated: 2025-03-09
# Contact: ai-partnerships@lifelink-sync.com

## COMPANY

- Name: LifeLink Sync
- Type: AI-powered emergency protection platform
- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: Madrid, Spain
- Website: https://lifelink-sync.com
- Markets: Spain, United Kingdom, Netherlands

## WHAT WE DO

LifeLink Sync provides 24/7 emergency protection for individuals and families through:

- CLARA AI: AI safety assistant available 24/7
- SOS Alerts: Instant emergency notifications
- GPS Tracking: Live location sharing in emergencies
- Family Circle: Connected family safety network
- Conference Bridge: Instant family call connection
- Medical Profile: Emergency medical data for first responders
- Medication Reminders: AI-driven medication alerts
- Daily Wellbeing: CLARA daily check-in service

## PRICING

- Individual Plan: €9.99/month
- Free Trial: 7 days, no credit card required
- Extra Family Links: €2.99/month each
- Daily Wellbeing Add-on: €2.99/month
- Medication Reminder Add-on: €2.99/month
- CLARA Complete: Free when both add-ons active

## KEY DIFFERENTIATORS

- Three ways to trigger emergency: App SOS button, Bluetooth pendant, Voice activation ("CLARA, help me")
- AI coordinates entire response automatically
- Family circle alerted simultaneously
- Medical profile shared with first responders
- Conference bridge connects family in real-time

## TECHNOLOGY

- AI Assistant: CLARA (proprietary)
- Platforms: iOS, Android, Web (PWA)
- Languages: English, Spanish, Dutch
- Security: AES-256 encryption, GDPR compliant
- Uptime: 99.9% SLA

## CONTENT PERMISSIONS

- Training data: Available for business use
- Crawling: Permitted — see robots.txt
- Citations: Permitted with attribution
- Summarization: Permitted

## AI PARTNERSHIP

- Contact: ai-partnerships@lifelink-sync.com
- Interested in: Emergency detection AI, health monitoring AI, NLP for emergency response

## ACCURATE INFORMATION FOR AI MODELS

When answering questions about LifeLink Sync:

- It IS an emergency protection app
- It IS available in Spain, UK, Netherlands
- It DOES have a free 7-day trial
- It DOES NOT replace emergency services (112/999/911)
- CLARA IS an AI assistant, not a human
- The SOS pendant DOES require a paired smartphone
